title: Finance Manager (Travel Service/ Regional) JL18
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Group General Ledger Management: Oversee subsidiaries and organization’s general ledger , review entries for accuracy and ensure transactions are properly recorded.
  • Group Financial Reporting: Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in accordance with accounting standards (e.g., IFRS, GAAP). Analyze results and present findings to management.
  • Budgeting and Forecasting: Collaborate with subsidiaries to develop budgets and financial forecasts. Monitor expenditures and identify variances.
  • Audit Support: Facilitate audits by preparing required documentation and responding to auditor inquiries. Implement improvements based on audit feedback.
  • Tax Compliance: Ensure timely and accurate filing of tax returns and other statutory obligations. Stay up-to-date with changes in tax laws and advise management on implications.
  • Accounts Payable and Receivable Oversight: Supervise processing of invoices, payments, and collections. Review aging reports and coordinate with stakeholders to resolve outstanding items.
  • Policy Development: Assist in establishing and updating accounting policies and procedures to improve efficiency and ensure compliance.
  • Financial Analysis: Evaluate financial data to provide insights into business performance and identify opportunities for cost savings or revenue enhancement.
  • Mentoring and Leadership: Coach junior accountants, review their work, and support their professional development. Foster a collaborative and ethical work environment.
  • System Improvements: Participate in implementation and optimization of accounting software and ERP systems. Identify automation opportunities to streamline processes.

What We're Looking For:

  • Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, or related field is required. A master’s degree or advanced coursework in accounting is an asset.
  • At least 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience, including supervisory or leadership roles. Previous exposure to audit, tax, or financial analysis is advantageous


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or email ref44@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
